subject: docs(todo): add cross-project alignment items from glow-props comparison
body:
Compared repo-tor CLAUDE.md against glow-props shared CLAUDE.md and
suggested implementations. Added 20 actionable TODO items across 4 groups:
CLAUDE.md updates, HamburgerMenu a11y/iOS fixes, layout/infrastructure,
and dark mode improvements.

Removed postMessage data push TODO (explicitly rejected in chartColors.js
in favor of URL params). Moved light theme CSS vars to dark mode group.

Tags: documentation, cross-project, alignment
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: cross-project-alignment
